label: Flow 1 — MQTT Ingestion
info:
Subscribes to building/# on Mosquitto (WebSocket ws://mosquitto:9001).
Extracts sensor type from topic → routes to per-type parser.
Each parser validates required fields per NODERED_CONTRACT.md §5.
Output 1 of each parser = valid msg (→ Flow 2).
Output 2 of each parser = invalid msg (→ debug error).

name:
Flow 1 — MQTT Multi-source Ingestion
broker: ws://mosquitto:9001 | topic: building/# | QoS 1 | MQTT 3.1.1
Contract: NODERED_CONTRACT.md §5
Extract Sensor Type
Parse Badge
Parse Door
Parse Motion
Parse Camera
Parse Network
